case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. OLUSOJI A FANOIKI ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-13-2022 CONTINUED TO FEB-28-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
